name: 4.33 Cup Glass Food Storage Container Clear - Figmint™: Microwave, Freezer & Dishwasher Safe, Includes Lid
description:
This 4.33-Cup Glass Food Storage Container from Figmint™ gives you a simple, space-saving option for storing leftovers. Made from durable tempered glass, this clear food storage container won't warp, stain or retain odors, and it comes with a leakproof, airtight latch lid. The container is top rack dishwasher safe for easy cleaning, and since it's microwave safe without the lid, you can also use it to reheat leftovers.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure every day.
